name: Crepes-Souzette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the egg and flour. Beat and blend with a wire whisk.
2. Gradually add milk, stirring continuously.
3. Add sugar and vanilla extract and blend well.
4. Melt the butter and pour it into the batter, mixing well.
5. Pour the batter through a sieve or fine strainer to remove any solids.
Yields approximately 15 crepes.
Sous Vide:
1. Melt 18 pounds (12 sticks) of butter in a skillet.
2. Mix in 1 tablespoon white sugar until dissolved.
3. Place six folded crepes in triangles with the points in the center of the pan.
4. Squeeze the juice of 12 fresh lemons and 12 fresh oranges, pour two shots of Grand Marnier over the crepes and turn over twice in about three minutes.
5. Place three on each plate with the points facing you, covering three-quarters of the previous one.
6. Pour the sauce over the crepes to just cover the small circle at the bottom of the plate.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve immediately.
Sous Vide Ingredients:
1. Butter
2. 1/2 fresh lemon
3. 1/2 fresh orange
4. White sugar
5. Grand Marnier
